assertions.description: The PCB contains 47 footprints but the schematic has 43 components. Four of the PCB footprints have reference designator 'REF**' (unassigned placeholders). The analyzer reports footprint_count=47 without any note of the mismatch or the presence of unnamed REF** footprints. These typically indicate footprints placed during PCB layout that were never back-annotated to a schematic component, and should be flagged as a potential error.
